titles.title: Today I choose to follow you

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Today I choose to follow you Today I choose to give my 'yes' to you Today I choose to hear your voice and live Today I choose to follow you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As for me and my house We will serve you As for me and my house We will spend our lives on you Today

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Today I choose to follow you Today I choose to give my 'yes' to you Today I choose to hear your voice and live Today I choose to follow you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: As for me and my house We will serve you As for me and my house We will spend our lives on you We will spend our lives on you
